title: Cross-platform Compile Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan to replace the stubbed AOT build and add --target cross-compilation via zig cc.
notes: This is an execution plan (task checklist with steps/tests/commits), not an ADR/PRD/SPEC itself. It references and implements a separate design spec (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-20-cross-platform-compile-design.md) which should be classified independently as the authoritative SPEC. Classified as DOC (context/plan artifact) rather than SPEC since it contains no independent contract definitions beyond restating the spec's constraints.
